clarity.notes: Navigation remains reduced to Home, Events, Visit, and Join; visible copy now reads as club-facing content rather than prototype scaffolding.

hierarchy.notes: The polish pass reduced nested card surfaces, replaced list cards with separators, and kept the photo-led hierarchy intact.

typography.notes: Compact Manrope-style hierarchy is more consistent after tightening headings, eyebrows, and paragraph rhythm across the edited sections.

motion.notes: Existing hero and gallery carousel behavior remains intact, including dynamic slide counts, thumbnails, pause/play, and share interactions.

brand.notes: Dark RC club system remains restrained: black logo area, functional red accents, real aircraft/field photography placeholders, and fewer generic AI-style boxes.
